text: Hello? Hey, this is Chelsea. There's a note on your Medicare profile that your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed. Just a quick confirmation from you, and we're all set. Do you have Part A and Part B? Sorry, it looks like you don't qualify for the plan. Have a great day.
